title: Authentication Bypass
description: Code patterns that unconditionally return true for authentication checks, skip token validation, or disable authentication middleware violate SOC2 CC6.1 and CC6.2 logical access controls.

finding.message: Authentication bypass pattern '{{token}}' detected in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Never hardcode authentication results to true; always evaluate credentials against the identity provider.
Remove debug/development auth bypass code before merging to main or production branches.
Implement mandatory authentication middleware that cannot be bypassed via configuration flags.
Use feature flags with a secrets manager rather than code-level bypass switches.
